message:
feat: Implement more TODO stubs with real functionality

structseq.zig:
- Deep comparison using PyObject_RichCompareBool for struct sequence items

capsule.zig:
- capsule_repr: Full format with name and hex address
- PyCapsule_Import: Module import and attribute traversal to find capsule

codeobject.zig:
- code_richcompare: Compare argcount, kwonlyargcount, nlocals, flags, name, filename, consts, names
- PyCode_Addr2Location: Decode linetable to find line number for bytecode offset

descrobject.zig:
- property_descr_get: Call getter with PyObject_CallOneArg
- property_descr_set: Call setter/deleter with proper args

typevarobject.zig:
- typevartuple_repr: Prepend * to name for unpack notation

setobject.zig:
- PySet_Clear: Free external table memory when resetting to smalltable

All implementations are functional code with proper logic.
